verified_claim: Age of Empires IV's console release condenses RTS commands into controller-oriented radial menus while retaining keyboard and mouse support. Published screenshots keep the battle field central and information at the perimeter; no universal numeric HUD ratio is specified.
applicability: One semantic command model across inputs is universal; AoE IV's exact radial layout and civilization styling are title-specific.
battle_screen_implication: Expose the same select, move/rally, target, command, dismiss, and back actions through keyboard, pointer, and touch. On coarse-pointer screens, use a compact contextual command surface rather than a second game loop; do not assert a source-free HUD percentage.
anti_pattern: A desktop-only group-rally gesture, a touch-only ruleset, or an invented 70/30 viewport claim used as a design target.
acceptance_criterion: Desktop and 360px mobile can activate the same current objective and group/personal orders by distinct but semantically equivalent input paths.
